scenarios.scenario-1: Compose build and run starts services with stable volume mounts for DETS and certificates.
scenarios.scenario-2: Port 443 conflicts or invalid mounts fail fast with operator-readable diagnostics.

critical-invariants.invariant-1: Persistent volumes are mounted before first write.
critical-invariants.invariant-2: One deployment topology can host both portal and proxy capabilities.

side-effects.effect-1: Creates and starts containers, networks, and named volumes.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Do not leak env-expanded secrets in compose diagnostics.

verification-levels.wave-level: Container startup and restart persistence checks.
verification-levels.phase-level: Live portal plus issuance flow survives compose restart.
